name: aurora-input-group
title: Aurora Input Group
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Grouped input shell with addons for protocol, units, and compact command prefixes.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/input-group.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-input`.
